free_text: Photoneutron reaction cross sections  for  197Au  and
Photoneutron yields for 197Au and 209Bi were measured
for  energies  Eg < 28 MeV.  Reaction cross sections
were obtained using Penfold-Leiss unfolding  method.
Integrated cross sections are equal to 4060 and 4590
Data were compiled at the Russia MSU SINP
by BRS in line REACTION of SUBENTS 002 - 009;  TITLE
comments to   REACTION  for  SUBENTS  002  and  003,
DATA-ERR for SUBENTs 002 - 005,  DERIV  for  SUBENTs
